title: helianthus debilis subsp. vestitus
intro: Helianthus debilis subsp. vestitus, also known as the Asian sunflower or silverleaf sunflower, is a subspecies of the annual sunflower plant that is native to East Asia and the Philippines. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and seeds can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Additionally, Helianthus debilis subsp. vestitus is also used to make a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations, thanks to its antiseptic and antioxidant properties.
